_comment: YOUR brand — the single config boundary every component and engine reads. Edit it in the UI's Brand page, by hand, or ask the agent: 'interview me about my brand, then fill in brand/brand.json'. Ships neutral on purpose.
name: My Brand
_name: Shown in lower thirds / logo stings and read by the QA council's brand specialist.

colors._comment: Hex colors. primary = background, secondary = main text, accent = highlights/CTA pills, muted = secondary text. Avoid greens near #00FF00 — that zone is reserved for green-screen keying (the components will warn).

tone._comment: How the agent writes your copy. register: casual | professional | playful. sellStyle: soft | neutral | direct — soft never hard-sells ('no BUY NOW banners'), direct is conversion-first. language: the language your videos speak (ISO 639-1: en, da, de, es...).

voice._comment: ElevenLabs voice for AI voice-overs. Paste your own cloned voice ID, or pick a generic voice at https://elevenlabs.io/voices. INTENTIONALLY EMPTY until you set it — TTS will ask rather than guess.

_brandWords: Words unique to your brand (product names, slogans, your name). They get stripped from prompts sent to generators that must not echo them (e.g. Seedance).
_logoPath: Optional logo path inside public/ (e.g. public/brand/logo-light.svg). Used by LogoSting and the brand QA lens.
